mapper.sql: id , follower_id, following_id, follow_status, is_special_follow, source, follow_time, unfollow_time, remark, created_at, updated_at
inner join sys_user u on u.id = f.following_id and u.deleted_flag = 0 and u.status = 1
inner join sys_user u on u.id = f.follower_id and u.deleted_flag = 0 and u.status = 1

if.test: query != null and query.source != null and query.source != ''
query != null and query.keyword != null and query.keyword != ''

where.if: and ( follower.username like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or follower.nickname like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or following.username like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or following.nickname like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )

trim.if: or follower.id is null or following.id is null or follower.deleted_flag = 1 or following.deleted_flag = 1
or (follower.id is not null and follower.deleted_flag = 0 and follower.status != 1) or (following.id is not null and following.deleted_flag = 0 and following.status != 1)

mapper.select:
select count(1) from sys_user_follow f
where f.follower_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1
and f.is_special_follow = 1

select f.id as relation_id, u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, f.is_special_follow, f.remark, case when reverse_relation.id is null then 0 else 1 end as mutual_follow, f.follow_time from sys_user_follow f
left join sys_user_follow reverse_relation on reverse_relation.follower_id = f.following_id and reverse_relation.following_id = f.follower_id and reverse_relation.follow_status = 1 where f.follower_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1
and f.is_special_follow = 1
order by f.is_special_follow desc, f.follow_time desc, f.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select count(1) from sys_user_follow f
where f.following_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1

select f.id as relation_id, u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, coalesce(reverse_relation.is_special_follow, 0) as is_special_follow, reverse_relation.remark as remark, case when reverse_relation.id is null then 0 else 1 end as mutual_follow, f.follow_time from sys_user_follow f
left join sys_user_follow reverse_relation on reverse_relation.follower_id = #{userId} and reverse_relation.following_id = f.follower_id and reverse_relation.follow_status = 1 where f.following_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1 order by f.follow_time desc, f.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select count(1) from sys_user_follow f
where f.follower_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1

select count(1) from sys_user_follow f
where f.following_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1

select count(1) from sys_user_follow f
where f.follower_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1

select u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, f.follow_time from sys_user_follow f
where f.follower_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1 order by f.follow_time desc, f.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select count(1) from sys_user_follow f
where f.following_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1

select u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, f.follow_time from sys_user_follow f
where f.following_id = #{userId} and f.follow_status = 1 order by f.follow_time desc, f.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
select count(1) from sys_user_follow f left join sys_user follower on follower.id = f.follower_id left join sys_user following on following.id = f.following_id

select f.id as relation_id, f.follower_id, follower.username as follower_username, follower.nickname as follower_nickname, follower.status as follower_status, follower.deleted_flag as follower_deleted_flag, f.following_id, following.username as following_username, following.nickname as following_nickname, following.status as following_status, following.deleted_flag as following_deleted_flag, f.follow_status, f.is_special_follow, f.source, f.remark, f.follow_time, f.unfollow_time, f.created_at, f.updated_at from sys_user_follow f left join sys_user follower on follower.id = f.follower_id left join sys_user following on following.id = f.following_id
order by f.updated_at desc, f.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
select count(1) from sys_user_follow f left join sys_user follower on follower.id = f.follower_id left join sys_user following on following.id = f.following_id where
mapper.delete: delete f from sys_user_follow f left join sys_user follower on follower.id = f.follower_id left join sys_user following on following.id = f.following_id where
